name: rig
description: rig — a LEGO-style harness composer. Compose bricks (facets/patterns/steps/recipes) at invocation time into a task-specific agent harness. Domain-agnostic engine: dev-flow orchestration (review, implement, PR), pluggable domain packs (e.g. sales deal-review), a conversational mode (rig:talk) that routes natural language to the right flow, and a goal-driven loop (rig:goal) that converges a high-level goal to its acceptance criteria. Claude Code native; no heavy DSL engine.
